title: Third-Party Package Updates in Splunk AppDynamics Private Synthetic Agent (PSA) - May 2026
description: Third-Party Package Updates in Splunk AppDynamics Private Synthetic Agent (PSA) - May 2026
solution:
Upgrade Splunk AppDynamics Private Synthetic Agent to version 26.4.0 or higher.
Product Status
Product
Base Version
Affected Version
Fix Version
Splunk AppDynamics Private Synthetic Agent
26.4
Below 26.4.0
26.4.0
